meaning_kannada: ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯ ವರ್ತಮಾನ ಕಾಲ (ದಿನನಿತ್ಯದ ಅಭ್ಯಾಸಗಳು, ಸಾರ್ವತ್ರಿಕ ಸತ್ಯಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ನಿಗದಿತ ವೇಳಾಪಟ್ಟಿಗಳನ್ನು ಸೂಚಿಸಲು ಬಳಸಲಾಗುತ್ತದೆ).
meaning_english:
Used for habitual actions, universal truths, and fixed future schedules.

• Structure: Subject + V1 (s/es for singular subjects like He/She/It) + Object.
• Example 1: The Sun *rises* in the east. (Universal Truth)
• Example 2: The train *leaves* at 9:00 AM tomorrow. (Scheduled Event)

meaning_kannada: ಅಪೂರ್ಣ ವರ್ತಮಾನ ಕಾಲ (ಮಾತನಾಡುವ ಪ್ರಸ್ತುತ ಕ್ಷಣದಲ್ಲಿ ನಡೆಯುತ್ತಿರುವ ಕ್ರಿಯೆಗಳನ್ನು ಸೂಚಿಸಲು ಬಳಸಲಾಗುತ್ತದೆ).
meaning_english:
Used for actions happening right now at the time of speaking.

• Structure: Subject + am/is/are + V1 + ing + Object.
• Example: Ravi *is writing* a Python script at the moment.
• Key Words: Now, at present, at this moment, currently.

meaning_kannada: ಭಾವನೆಗಳು, ಮಾಲೀಕತ್ವ ಮತ್ತು ಜ್ಞಾನವನ್ನು ತಿಳಿಸುವ ಕೆಲವು ಸ್ಥಿರ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದಗಳನ್ನು (Love, Own, Know, Understand) ಎಂದಿಗೂ Continuous ರೂಪದಲ್ಲಿ ಬಳಸಬಾರದು.
meaning_english:
Stative verbs represent a state, not a physical action. They are NOT used in continuous tenses.

• Wrong: I *am knowing* the answer. / He *is owning* a car.
• Right: I *know* the answer. ✅ / He *owns* a car. ✅

meaning_kannada: Present Perfect ಮತ್ತು Simple Past ನಡುವಿನ ವ್ಯತ್ಯಾಸ. ಕಳೆದ ಹೋದ ಸಮಯವನ್ನು (Yesterday, In 2024) ನಿಖರವಾಗಿ ಉಲ್ಲೇಖಿಸಿದಾಗ ಕಡ್ಡಾಯವಾಗಿ Simple Past ಬಳಸಬೇಕು.
meaning_english:
Use Simple Past when a specific past time is mentioned. Use Present Perfect when the action is completed but the time is not specified.

• Wrong: I *have submitted* the RTI draft yesterday.
• Right: I *submitted* the RTI draft yesterday. ✅ (Simple Past)
• Right: I *have submitted* the RTI draft. ✅ (Present Perfect - No time mentioned)

meaning_kannada: ಹಿಂದೆ ಆರಂಭವಾಗಿ ಪ್ರಸ್ತುತದಲ್ಲೂ ಮುಂದುವರಿದಿರುವ ಕ್ರಿಯೆಗಳು. ಇದಕ್ಕೆ 'Since' (ನಿರ್ದಿಷ್ಟ ಸಮಯ) ಮತ್ತು 'For' (ಸಮಯದ ಅವಧಿ) ಬಳಸಲಾಗುತ್ತದೆ.
meaning_english:
Used for actions that started in the past and are still continuing in the present.

• Structure: Subject + has/have + been + V1+ing + Object + since/for.
• Since: Point of time (e.g., since Monday, since 2025).
• For: Duration of time (e.g., for two hours, for five years).
• Example: He *has been studying* for the UPSC prelims since morning.

meaning_kannada: ಭೂತಕಾಲದಲ್ಲಿ ಎರಡು ಕ್ರಿಯೆಗಳು ನಡೆದಾಗ, ಮೊದಲು ನಡೆದ ಕ್ರಿಯೆಗೆ Past Perfect (had + V3) ಮತ್ತು ನಂತರ ನಡೆದ ಕ್ರಿಯೆಗೆ Simple Past (V2) ಬಳಸಬೇಕು.
meaning_english:
When two actions happened in the past, the first action takes Past Perfect (had + V3) and the second action takes Simple Past (V2).

• Wrong: The train left before I reached the Delhi station.
• Right: The train *had left* (1st action) before I *reached* (2nd action) the Delhi station. ✅

meaning_kannada: ಭವಿಷ್ಯತ್ತಿನ ಷರತ್ತುಬದ್ಧ ವಾಕ್ಯಗಳಲ್ಲಿ (If, When, As soon as, Until), ಕರಾರಿನ ಭಾಗಕ್ಕೆ (Condition) Simple Present ಬಳಸಬೇಕು ಮತ್ತು ಮುಖ್ಯ ಭಾಗಕ್ಕೆ Simple Future ಬಳಸಬೇಕು.
meaning_english:
In conditional sentences referring to the future, the time/conditional clause takes Simple Present, and the main clause takes Simple Future. Do not use 'will' twice.

• Wrong: If it *will rain*, I *will stay* at home.
• Right: If it *rains* (Simple Present), I *will stay* at home (Simple Future). ✅

meaning_kannada: ವಾಕ್ಯದಲ್ಲಿ Ago, Yesterday, Last Night, Last Week, Back ನಂತಹ ಭೂತಕಾಲದ ಸೂಚಕಗಳಿದ್ದರೆ ಕಡ್ಡಾಯವಾಗಿ Simple Past (V2) ಮಾತ್ರ ಬಳಸಬೇಕು.
meaning_english:
The presence of past time markers strictly demands the Simple Past tense structure.

• Structure: Subject + V2 + Object.
• Example 1: The state board *released* the notification two days ago. ✅
• Example 2: He *completed* the accounts audit last week. ✅

meaning_kannada: ಭವಿಷ್ಯತ್ತಿನ ನಿರ್ದಿಷ್ಟ ಸಮಯದ ಒಳಗಾಗಿ ಮುಗಿದುಹೋಗುವ ಕ್ರಿಯೆಗಳು. ಇದು ಹೆಚ್ಚಾಗಿ 'By the time' ಅಥವಾ 'By next month' ಎಂಬ ಕ್ಲೂ ಹೊಂದಿರುತ್ತದೆ.
meaning_english:
Used to indicate an action that will be completed by a certain specified time in the future.

• Structure: Subject + will have + V3 + Object.
• Example: By next week, Ravi *will have developed* the complete front-end layout of PrepEase.

word: It is time / It is high time Exception
meaning_kannada: ವಾಕ್ಯವು 'It is time' ಅಥವಾ 'It is high time' ಇಂದ ಆರಂಭವಾಗಿ ನಂತರ ಕರ್ತೃ (Subject) ಬಂದರೆ, ಮುಂದೆ ಕಡ್ಡಾಯವಾಗಿ Simple Past (V2) ಬಳಸಬೇಕು.
meaning_english:
Phrases like 'It is time' or 'It is high time' are followed by a subject and a verb in the Simple Past (V2) form to denote that something is already delayed.

• Wrong: It is high time we start studying for departmental exams.
• Right: It is high time we *started* studying for departmental exams. ✅
